hooks.prompt:
Run the following command from the project root and fix any issues encountered:

  bun install && bunx tsc --noEmit && bun test && deno fmt && deno lint index.ts src/ tests/ && deno doc --html --name=template-bun-library index.ts

If the command exits cleanly, do nothing and stop.

If there are failures:
- Type errors (tsc --noEmit): read the file at the reported line, understand the type mismatch, and fix it (e.g. add undefined checks, narrow types, use non-null assertions where safe). Re-run bunx tsc --noEmit to confirm.
- Test failures: read the failing test and implementation, identify the root cause, fix it in the source file, then re-run bun test to confirm.
- Lint errors: fix the reported violations in the listed files.
- Format changes: deno fmt auto-fixes files in place; just run it.
- Doc generation errors: fix the TypeScript issues causing them.

After any fixes, re-run the full command chain to confirm everything passes before stopping.
